title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: 1. **Preflight snapshot (must save for rollback)** ```sql SELECT user_id,email,role,is_active,password_hash,reset_token,reset_token_expires FROM cockpit_users WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; SELECT COUNT(*) AS refresh_count FROM cockpit_refresh_tokens WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; ``` 2. **Prepare temporary reset state (short TTL, single run ID)** - Generate `RESET_TOKEN` (high entropy) and `NEW_PASSWORD`. ```sql UPDATE cockpit_users SET is_active=1, reset_token='<RESET_TOKEN>', reset_token_expires=strftime('%s','now')+600 WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; -- Optional sentinel to prove revocation INSERT INTO cockpit_refresh_tokens(token,user_id,expires_at,created_at) VALUES('<SENTINEL_REFRESH>','happy-smoke-operator',strftime('%s','now')+3600,strftime('%s','now')); ``` 3. **Execute reset-password smoke** ```bash curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/cockpit/auth/reset-password" \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"resetToken":"'"$RESET_TOKEN"'","newPassword":"'"$NEW_PASSWORD"'"}' ``` - Expect `200` with `accessToken` + `refreshToken`. 4. **Prove effects** - Old/sentinel refresh token is revoked: ```bash curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/cockpit/auth/refresh" \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"refreshToken":"'"$SENTINEL_REFRESH"'"}' ``` - Expect `401`. - Login with new password works: ```bash curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/cockpit/auth/login" \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d '{"email":"happy-smoke@cockpit.local","password":"'"$NEW_PASSWORD"'"}' ``` - Expect `200`. 5. **Cleanup (always run, even on failure)** ```sql DELETE FROM cockpit_refresh_tokens WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; UPDATE cockpit_users SET is_active=0, password_hash=NULL, reset_token=NULL, reset_token_expires=NULL WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; ``` 6. **Cleanup assertions (required)** ```sql SELECT is_active,password_hash,reset_token,reset_token_expires FROM cockpit_users WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; -- expect: 0, NULL, NULL, NULL SELECT COUNT(*) AS refresh_count FROM cockpit_refresh_tokens WHERE user_id='happy-smoke-operator'; -- expect: 0 ``` Guardrails: use a `finally`/trap cleanup block, keep token TTL ≤10 min, do not log token/password values, and abort on any unexpected status before continuing.
